title: SuerEchoY
subTitle: 连接底层硅片与具身智能
style: <style>@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;700&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@400;500;700&display=swap'); :root { --accent:#2563eb; --accent-soft:#dbeafe; --ink:#0f172a; --muted:#475569; --card:#ffffff; } body { font-family:'Space Grotesk','Noto Sans SC',sans-serif; background: radial-gradient(circle at 10% -10%, #e2e8f0 0%, #f8fafc 35%, #f8fafc 100%); } body::before { content:''; position:fixed; inset:0; background-size: 38px 38px; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(15,23,42,.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(15,23,42,.05) 1px, transparent 1px); pointer-events:none; z-index:0; } body.home-page .Header { display:none !important; } body.home-page .container { margin-top:88vh !important; position:relative; z-index:5; padding-top:30px; background:transparent; } #custom-hero { position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:88vh; z-index:4; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; color:var(--ink); } .hero-nav { position:absolute; top:20px; width:min(1120px,92vw); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:12px 16px; border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12); background:rgba(255,255,255,.75); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius:16px; } .hero-brand { font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.5px; font-size:1.1rem; } .hero-nav-links a { text-decoration:none; color:var(--muted); margin-left:18px; font-weight:500; } .hero-nav-links a:hover { color:var(--accent); } .hero-avatar { width:110px; height:110px; border-radius:999px; border:4px solid #fff; box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(37,99,235,.22); object-fit:cover; margin-bottom:18px; } .hero-title { font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem); margin:8px 0; line-height:1.1; font-weight:700; } .hero-title b { color:var(--accent); } .hero-sub { font-size:clamp(1rem,2vw,1.2rem); color:var(--muted); max-width:760px; margin:0 auto 20px auto; } .hero-cta { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; } .hero-btn { padding:10px 16px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.25); font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; } .hero-btn-primary { background:var(--accent); color:#fff; border-color:var(--accent); } .hero-btn-ghost { color:var(--accent); background:#fff; } .SideNav-item { background:var(--card); border-radius:14px !important; margin-bottom:14px; border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08); box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.06); transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease; } .SideNav-item:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3); box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(37,99,235,.14); } .markdown-body { position:relative; z-index:1; } .profile-shell { margin-top:8px; } .profile-intro { background:rgba(255,255,255,.84); border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.1); border-radius:18px; padding:24px; margin-bottom:18px; box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(15,23,42,.08); } .profile-intro h2 { margin:0 0 8px 0; font-size:1.9rem; } .profile-intro p { margin:0; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.7; } .profile-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:14px; margin:16px 0 20px 0; } .profile-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.1); border-radius:16px; padding:18px; box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(15,23,42,.05); } .profile-card h3 { margin:0 0 8px 0; font-size:1.05rem; } .profile-card p { margin:0; color:var(--muted); font-size:.95rem; line-height:1.65; } .project-list { display:grid; gap:14px; } .project-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.1); border-radius:16px; padding:18px; } .project-card h4 { margin:0 0 6px 0; font-size:1.08rem; } .project-card p { margin:0; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.65; } .pill { display:inline-block; margin:6px 8px 0 0; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:999px; font-size:.8rem; background:var(--accent-soft); color:#1e3a8a; font-weight:600; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .profile-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .hero-nav-links { display:none; } body.home-page .container { margin-top:78vh !important; } #custom-hero { height:78vh; } }</style>
